case_title: WOODS, BRENDA vs. MUISE, DEBORAH et al

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF WOODS, BRENDA AS TO DEFENDANT MUISE, DEBORAH MILLER, LEONARD DOES I-X SUMMONS ISSUED

#1 BENSON/NAJERA: C/C FOR SETTL CONF. PLTF PRESENT W/ ATTY D KIRBY. DEFTS L MILLER & D MUISE PRESENT IN PRO PER. DEFAULT HAS BEEN ENTERED AGAINST D MUISE. CASE SETTLED ON RECORD. JDMT BY STIP FOR PLTF AGAINST BOTH DEFTS. PLTF TO PREPARE JDMT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MUISE, DEBORAH MILLER, LEONARD THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1069 OAK, STAYED UNTIL JUN-10-1996, LEASE FORFEITED, 5:00 PM. IF DEFTS FAIL TO VACATE ON TIME, PLTF MAY AMEND JDMT FOR BACK RENT & DAMAGES. PLTF TO KEEP ALL DEPOSITS.
